'''LN-26''' was [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon's]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Majordomo/Legends|majordomo]] at his [[Fort Tusken/Legends|home]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She served Tallon with his wife [[Kay Tallon|Kay]], working alongside the two servants [[Morr Wenn|Morr]] and [[Cala Wenn]]. LN-26 had been programmed with a [[Gender/Legends|feminine]] personality and mannerisms. It was easily scared, as shown when the crew of the ''[[Alabak's Gold]]''{{'s}} met it. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Adar Tallon decided to [[Escape from Tatooine|leave]] Tatooine and took Kay and LN-26 with him.<ref name="TM" />
